labels.title: Title
labels.label: Label
labels.name: Name
labels.showPageTitleHelp: Display the page title above the content.

messages.dashboardIntro: Overview of your CMS content, site settings, and admin workspace.
messages.dashboardTemplateHelp: Edit the raw HTML shell for the public header, navbar, page wrapper, and footer.
messages.manageSecrets: Add, review, and delete securely stored admin secrets.
messages.secretsHelp: Secrets are encrypted at rest and shown only in masked form.
messages.secretEncryptedHint: The token is stored encrypted and is never revealed again in the UI.
messages.manageMedia: Manage uploaded files and storage integration.
messages.mediaLibraryHelp: Upload files to Cloudflare R2 or any S3-compatible bucket, then preview or remove them from this library.
messages.mediaUploadHint: Choose one or more files to upload. The current storage provider is used automatically.
messages.changesSaveAdminApi: Changes save through permission-checked admin APIs.
messages.cannotSaveForm: Your role can view this form but cannot save changes.
messages.changesSavePageRoutes: Changes save through permission-checked page routes.
messages.cannotSavePage: Your role can view this page but cannot save changes.
messages.localizedPostHelp: Write the title and content for each supported language in one editor.
messages.localizedPageHelp: Keep every language version of this page inside one editor.
messages.languageCodeHelp: Use ISO codes such as en, vi, or en-US.
messages.noPostsHelp: Create the first post to start building the editorial workflow.
messages.noPagesHelp: Create a page to add route-based content beyond the blog.
messages.noRolesHelp: Create a role to group permission bundles for admin users.
messages.noUsersHelp: Create an admin user to grant access to the dashboard.
messages.managePublishedArticles: Manage published articles and drafts from a focused table view.
messages.manageLandingPages: Manage landing pages and reusable route content from a dedicated list workspace.
messages.manageBanners: Manage banner slides from a dedicated library.
messages.manageBannersHelp: Create banner slides here, then choose them inside page sections.
messages.manageContactForms: Manage contact forms from a dedicated library.
messages.manageContactFormsHelp: Create contact forms here, then choose them inside page sections.
messages.bannerSectionHub: Banner sliders are configured inside page editors.
messages.bannerSectionHelp: Open a page editor and use the Page sections panel to add or remove banner sliders.
messages.contactFormHub: Contact forms are configured in the dedicated contact form library.
messages.contactFormSectionHelp: Open a page editor and use the Page sections panel to select a saved contact form.
messages.contactFormBuilderHelp: Add the shared fields that should appear in this contact form.
messages.createContactFormHelp: Create a new contact form with localized field labels.
messages.editContactFormHelp: Edit an existing contact form and its fields.
messages.settingsHub: Manage the core site settings from one screen.
messages.footerSaveFailed: Footer template could not be saved.
messages.manageRoles: Manage RBAC roles and permission bundles.
messages.manageRoleBundles: Manage reusable role bundles from a dedicated list with route-based actions.
messages.manageUsers: Manage admin users and role assignments.
messages.manageAdminUsers: Manage admin users from a focused list without inline create or edit panels.
messages.manageLanguagesHelp: Create, enable, and default languages from one admin workspace.
messages.siteSettingsHelp: Manage site title, favicon, header colors, and footer settings.
messages.siteSettingsFailed: Site settings could not be saved.
messages.languageRequestFailed: We could not load or update languages.
messages.translationListEmpty: This locale has no translation entries yet.
messages.manageTranslationsHelp: Manage translation key/value pairs for this language.
messages.headerSettingsFailed: Header settings could not be saved.
messages.pageNavigationHubHelp: Manage the navigation tree alongside page content so route relationships stay easy to maintain.
messages.pageListFiltersHelp: Search and filter the pages list while keeping the navigation editor in the same workspace.
messages.tryAdjustPageFilters: Try clearing the search or switching the status filter.
messages.noNavigationItemsConfigured: Add navigation rows to guide visitors through the site.
messages.accessDenied: Your account authenticated, but it does not currently have admin access.
messages.invalidCredentials: The email or password was invalid.
messages.signInIntro: Sign in with your admin email and password to access the CMS dashboard.
messages.manageRoleForm: Manage role labels and permission bundles from a dedicated form.
messages.manageUserForm: Manage admin user access and role assignments from one dedicated form.
messages.pageSectionsHelp: Enable the sections you want and set the order they should appear on the page.
messages.pageContentHelp: The localized content you wrote in the active language panel above.
messages.contactFormHelp: Displays a cleaner contact section with shared fields and minimal styling.
messages.contactFormIntro: Use this section to collect messages from visitors with a focused, minimal layout.
messages.contactFormSharedConfig: These fields are shared across every published page that uses the contact form section.
messages.contactFormSubmitFailed: We could not send your message.
messages.noContactFieldsConfiguredHelp: Add at least one shared field in the page editor to render the form on the frontend.
messages.configureHomePage: Create a CMS page and choose its slug as the home page in the header settings.
messages.configureHomePageBody: Create and publish a CMS page, then open the header settings and set Home page slug to that page slug, for example home.
messages.blogNotReadyBody: Check the D1 binding, database ID, and run the posts migration.
messages.postNotFoundBody: This post does not exist or is not published.
messages.homePageSlugHelp: For the homepage use a page slug like `home` or `/home`. Empty or `/` also falls back to `home`.
messages.navStorageHelp: Each row still saves in the same `Label|/path` or `Label|https://example.com` format.
